definition:
ἐμ-πορεύομαι  depon. 
 (ἔμπορος), [in LXX chiefly for סָחַר ;] 
  1. to travel, esp. for business. 
   2. to traffc, trade: Jas.4:13. 
   3. C. accusative of thing(s) 
   (a) to traffic in; 
   (b) to import: (Hos.12:1, for יָבַל hoph.). 
   4. C. accusative of person(s), to make a gain of: 2Pe.2:3.†
 (AS)
